name: Speed of light in vacuum
question_text: Which value is closest to the speed of light in vacuum?
general_feedback: The speed of light in vacuum is defined as exactly 299 792 458 m/s, usually approximated as 3 × 10⁸ m/s.
correct_feedback: Correct — This is the standard approximation of c.

answers.feedback: This is the standard approximation of c.
Two orders of magnitude too slow.
Two orders of magnitude too fast.
That is closer to the speed of sound in a metal rod, not light in vacuum.
